items.name: Assorted Appetizer
items.description: Vegetable samosas with mixed pakora.

items.description: Mixed vegetable fritters, fried and delicately spiced.

items.name: Paneer Pakora
items.description: Homemade cheese fritters.

items.name: Samosa Chaat
items.description: Samosa chaat. Hints of sweet, tangy, and spicy flavors combined with the robust chaat masala make this classic street food special.

items.name: Spring Roll
items.description: Vegetable spring roll come 2 pieces.

items.name: Vegetarian Samosa
items.description: Crisp turnover, filled with mildly spiced potatoes and peas.

items.name: Paneer 65
items.description: Marinating paneer cubes in a mix of yogurt and spices, then deep-frying them until golden and crispy.

items.name: Honey Cauliflower
items.description: Crispy, battered cauliflower florets tossed in a sweet and tangy sauce made with honey, garlic, soy sauce, and chili peppers, garnished with sesame seeds and green onions.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Chicken marinated with spices and saffron, then stem-cooked with naturally fragrant Basmati rice. A classic Mughal dish!

items.name: Goat Biryani
items.description: Juicy succulent goat cooked with flavorful rice, this combination is to die for.

items.description: Succulent pieces of curried lamb cooked with Basmati rice, gently flavored with saffron and nuts.

items.description: Shrimp marinated with spices and saffron, then steam cooked with naturally fragrant Basmati Rice.

items.description: Vegetable biryani made with fragrant basmati rice, yogurt, spices & mixed vegetables.

items.description: Flavorful Indian rice dish made with marinated cubes of paneer (Indian cottage cheese), layered with basmati rice, saffron, herbs, and a mix of biryani spices, then slow-cooked to perfection!

items.description: Chicken cooked in a light gravy, mild (curry).

items.description: Murgh methi malai is a decadent and luxurious Mughlai dish prepared with chicken and fresh methi (fenugreek) greens.

items.description: Chicken tikka masala is a dish of chunks of roasted marinated chicken in a spiced curry sauce. The sauce is usually creamy.

items.description: Tandoor baked chicken cooked in exotic spices with chopped tomatoes and butter.

items.description: Gulab jamun is a milk-solid-based sweet

items.description: Kheer a type of pudding from the Indian subcontinent, made by boiling milk, sugar, and rice

items.description: Masala chai is a flavoured tea beverage made by brewing black tea with a mixture of aromatic Indian spices and herbs.

items.description: coke

items.description: Mango lassi recipe (Indian mango yogurt drink).

items.name: Lamb Saag
